# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers PowerShell as terminal (powershell.exe)
- Workspace root is D:\Projects\DataFabric\
- Using Visual Studio Community 2026 (18.6.1)

## Coding Standards

Always:
- generate production-ready code
- avoid unnecessary abstraction
- prefer readable code over advanced patterns
- explain where files should be placed
- generate full imports
- avoid placeholders unless necessary
- use simple syntax and patterns
- avoid complex patterns and advanced features

For Angular:
- prefer standalone components
- use Angular Material
- use Reactive Forms
- avoid deprecated Angular syntax
- minimize RxJS complexity
- use strongly typed models
- keep frontend code beginner-friendly

For C#/.NET:
- prefer clean architecture
- use async/await properly
- avoid overengineering
- prefer maintainable services and repositories
